## Checklist

- [ ] I added **exactly one** `type:*` label (`type: feature` \| `type: bug` \| `type: enhancement` \| `type: documentation` \| `type: refactor` \| `type: maintenance` \| `type: security`) — if you can’t set labels (e.g. fork PR), say which type in a comment for maintainers
- [ ] I did **not** add `status:*` labels (those are for issues only)
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run test`, and `npm run build`
- [ ] I updated docs / `.env.example` when adding or changing configuration
